_comment: Copy this to team.json and fill in your team's values. install.sh does this interactively.

_customization_checklist.2_users_roles: Add users via Admin → Users after first login (admin / changeme)
_customization_checklist.3_partner_assignments: Admin → Team Cards → assign PSMs to partners
_customization_checklist.5_sector_focus: Update sectors array — drives Ventures filter and enrichment worker
_customization_checklist.6_partner_list: Import partners via Admin → Partners after first login
_customization_checklist.7_investment_thesis: Set INVESTMENT_THESIS in .env — used by AI enrichment workers
_customization_checklist.8_api_keys: Set OPENROUTER_API_KEY, BRAVE_API_KEY, PROXYCURL_API_KEY in .env (optional — only needed for plugin workers)
